markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize content and structure for the upcoming AI-led growth workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workshop Content:** The workshop will demonstrate a 0-to-1 workflow: using Lovable for rapid prototyping, then refining designs in Figma for production-ready assets.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Audience Education:** A core goal is to educate users on Lovable's full capabilities, including its new Claude Opus 4.5 chat mode and themes editor, which many users are unaware of.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [**Live Demo:** Marcel will conduct a live, audience-prompted build to prove the platform's speed and capability, while Jason and Ceci provide commentary.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [**Future Collaboration:** The teams will explore a co-sell motion and repurpose the workshop into a February "building in public" session for Lovable's marketing team.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

## Topics

### Workshop Content & Structure

  - [**Goal:** Inspire attendees by showcasing what's possible with AI-native marketing, not just a live build.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [**Intro:** Lovable's rapid growth story.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**GrowthX Workflow Demo:** A 15–20 min walkthrough of their 0-to-1 process.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This solves a key challenge for Lovable's team, who are currently blocked from using VibeCode pages on their main site due to design quality concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
          - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
            1.  [**VibeCode (Lovable):** Rapidly generate initial concepts.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
            2.  [**Refine (Figma):** Hand off to designers (e.g., Ren) for production-ready polish.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Lovable User Stories:** Showcase successful user projects, focusing on the specific prompts and workflows used to achieve results.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [**"How to Fully Use Lovable" Framework:** Educate users on underutilized features.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
          - [**Key Features to Highlight:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
              - [**Claude Opus 4.5 Chat Mode:** For planning and ideation.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
              - [**ChatGPT App:** For planning within the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
              - [**Themes Editor:** For visual control over colors, fonts, and spacing.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
              - [**Visual Edits:** Using screenshots as prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [**Live Build:** Marcel will create a page based on an audience prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Proves the platform's speed and capability in real-time.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
          - [**Execution:** Jason and Ceci will provide commentary while Marcel focuses on the build.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Logistics & Promotion

  - [**Promotion:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Current Status:** 500+ sign-ups before any major marketing push.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Actions:** Ceci will post on LinkedIn and in the Lovable community using GrowthX-provided drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Live Stream:** Will's contact, Alessandro, will provide professional camera, lighting, and audio in Rome.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Post-Production:** High-quality source footage will enable a polished, restructured video for long-term content.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Technical Check:** Ceci will run a Wi-Fi test on Friday or Monday to ensure a stable connection.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)

### Future Collaboration

  - [**Co-Sell Motion:** Explore a partnership where GrowthX handles programmatic marketing and Lovable powers content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Future Goal:** A joint case study showcasing this workflow with a shared customer.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Content Repurposing:** The workshop will be the basis for a February "building in public" session for Lovable's marketing team, detailing their work with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [**Lead Magnet:** Repurpose an existing guide by Lovable designer Felix Haas ("Prompt Hacks for Premium UI") as a post-workshop download.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [Create the workshop slide deck skeleton and assign owners.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [Find a GrowthX client case study for a future co-sell story.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Ceci:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Post workshop promotion on LinkedIn and in the Lovable community.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with the "Prompt Hacks" guide by Felix Haas.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Schedule a Wi-Fi test for Friday or Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [Get Ceci's contact info and address for the Rome production team.](https://fathom.video/share/GsgDbFvJdumzEWmD-BoCWd_jyZ5bSoSu?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
